seoTitle: Blowering vs Blue Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Blowering and Blue Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Blowering vs Blue Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Blowering and Blue Bay.
heading: Blowering vs Blue Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Blowering, New South Wales and Blue Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Blowering has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Blue Bay (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Blowering or Blue Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Blowering has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Blue Bay scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Blowering scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Blue Bay scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Blowering or Blue Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Blowering has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
